verses.text: Topa aw, nang pen keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong liansak ding a, nangma min ka phat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang nate na sem khin a, tanglai peka na geelnate a kip a kho takpi ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in khuapi ninbulomtang na suah a, a muan'huai khuapi a sia na suaksak hi. Mi kiphasakte' kumpi inn pen khua bang nawnlo a, cikmah hunin kilamkik nawnlo ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin mi thahatte in nangma min hong thangsak ding a, thukhuallo minamte' khuapite in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen mizawngte-a' dingin munmuan'huai, a cimawh mite-a' dingin a lungkhamna uhah munmuan'huai, huihpi panin bukna leh nisa panin nilim na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukhuallo mite' hihna pen huihpi in kulh a nawkgawp tawh kibang a
mun keuna-ah nisa mahmah tawh kibang hi. Nang in mi kiphasakte' gamlumna na daisak hi. Meii liim in nisa a votsak bangin thukhuallo mite' lasakna kitawpsak ta hi
Vanglian Topa in hih mual tungah mi khempeuh-a' dingin anlim nekna pawi, a ciil mahmah leenggahzu nekna pawi, guhngek tawh a kidim an nekna, a siangtho leenggahzu ciil nekna pawi bawl ding hi
Amah in mi khempeuh' khuk dahna puan leh minam khempeuh' silh dahna puante, hih mual tungah susia ding hi
Amah in sihna beimangsak ding a, maitang khempeuh panin khitui nul ding hi. Leitung khempeuh panin ama mite a kizahkona lakhia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi

Tua ni ciangin, “En un, amah pen eima Pasian ahi hi. Eite a hong hon dingin amah i ngak hi. Amah pen eima Topa ahi hi. Amah i ngak hi. Amah in eite hong honkhia ahih manin lungdamin kipak ni,” kici ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih Zion Mual hu ding a, ahi zongin Moab mite ahih leh ninkholna dum sungah buhkungte a kisikcip bangin kisikcip gawp ding hi
Tuipeekpa in tui peek dingin a khutte a van bangin amaute in a khut uh vanvan ding uh a, ahih hangin a khut uh a van simin a kiphatsaknate uh a khut uh tawh bengtumsuk ding uh hi
Amah in Moab mite' kulh muan'huaite suksiat sakin leilak den'na ding a, leivui suakmangkhin ding hi.
